vision_profile.current_state: Priyanka is an experienced BI Developer with 8 years of experience, proficient in SQL, Tableau, and Snowflake basics, but seeks to transition into modern data roles.
vision_profile.main_blocker: Her biggest blocker is the lack of experience with modern data stack tools like dbt and Airflow, and advanced data warehousing concepts, which makes her fear being replaced.
vision_profile.top_motivation: She is highly motivated to leverage her extensive BI experience to lead analytics engineering initiatives and move beyond legacy reporting.

milestones.label: M01
milestones.o: You will establish a strong foundation in Python for data, understand core data modeling principles, and begin exploring modern data warehousing concepts.
milestones.identity_statement: You are laying the groundwork to transform your BI expertise into a powerful modern data engineering skillset.

scenario.title: Debugging a Data Script
Cleaning and Transforming Data with Pandas
Building a Simple Data Ingestion Script

science.desc: You are given a Python script that processes customer data but fails intermittently. Identify and fix the bug, then optimize its performance.

modules.title: SQL & Snowflake for Analytics Engineering
lessons: Window functions & CTEs for complex analysis

scenario.title: Optimizing a Complex Reporting Query
Designing a Data Loading Strategy for Snowflake
Reducing Snowflake Compute Costs

science.desc: Explain how you would optimize a slow-running SQL query in Snowflake, considering both query structure and warehouse configuration.

scenario.title: Designing a Simple Sales Data Mart

video.title: Fact and Dimension Table Best Practices

scenario.title: Modeling Customer Behavior Data
Implementing Data Quality Rules in a Schema

milestones.label: M02
milestones.o: You will master dbt for data transformation, build robust data models, and implement data quality checks within a modern data warehouse.
milestones.identity_statement: You are becoming proficient in the core tools and methodologies that define modern analytics engineering.

modules.title: dbt Core: Setup & Basic Transformations
lessons: Building dbt models: views vs. tables

scenario.title: Troubleshooting a dbt Project Initialization
Creating Reusable dbt Macros
Implementing an Incremental Model

science.desc: A dbt run fails due to a dependency issue. Analyze the dbt logs and project structure to identify and resolve the circular dependency.

modules.title: Data Warehouse Modeling with dbt
lessons: Best practices for dbt project structure
Building fact and dimension models in dbt
Data lineage and documentation with dbt
Data quality testing with dbt tests
Implementing dbt snapshots for historical data

video.title: Designing Fact and Dimension Models in dbt

scenario.title: Refactoring a Legacy Data Model into dbt
Ensuring Data Integrity with dbt Tests
Documenting a Complex dbt Project

milestones.label: M03
milestones.t: Building Reliable Data Pipelines with Airflow
milestones.o: You will design, build, and monitor automated data pipelines using Apache Airflow, ensuring data freshness and reliability.
milestones.identity_statement: You are now orchestrating complex data flows, bringing automation and resilience to your data ecosystem.

scenario.title: Designing a Simple ETL DAG
Building a Multi-Stage Data Pipeline
Scheduling a Daily Data Refresh

science.desc: An Airflow DAG is stuck, and tasks are not progressing. Diagnose the issue using the Airflow UI and logs, then propose a solution.

scenario.title: Building a Custom Data Validation Operator
Implementing a CDC (Change Data Capture) Pipeline
Configuring Alerts for Data Pipeline Failures

milestones.label: M04
milestones.o: You will implement advanced data modeling techniques, optimize data warehouse performance, and ensure data governance for complex analytical needs.
milestones.identity_statement: You are refining your data architecture skills to build high-performing and well-governed data solutions.

modules.title: Advanced Data Warehouse Modeling
lessons: Designing data marts for specific use cases

scenario.title: Designing a Data Vault for Customer Data

video.title: Implementing SCD Type 2 in a Data Warehouse

scenario.title: Handling Historical Changes in Customer Attributes

video.title: Establishing Data Quality and Security Policies

scenario.title: Developing a Data Governance Strategy

science.desc: Describe how you would design a data model for a new product analytics platform, considering both historical data and real-time events.

modules.title: Data Warehouse Performance & Optimization
lessons: Cost management in cloud data warehouses

scenario.title: Optimizing a Complex Join Operation
Improving Query Latency in a Large Table

video.title: Strategies for Reducing Cloud Data Costs

scenario.title: Auditing and Optimizing Snowflake Costs

milestones.label: M05
milestones.o: You will design and implement scalable data architectures on cloud platforms, leveraging distributed systems for robust data processing.
milestones.identity_statement: You are now an architect of cloud-scale data systems, capable of building resilient and scalable data foundations.

modules.title: Cloud Data Warehousing & Lakehouse Concepts
lessons: Overview of cloud data warehouses (Snowflake, BigQuery, Redshift)
Data lake vs. data warehouse vs. data lakehouse
Serverless data processing with cloud functions
Choosing the right cloud data platform

scenario.title: Selecting a Cloud Data Platform for a Startup
Designing a Unified Data Platform

video.title: Leveraging Cloud Functions for Data Tasks

scenario.title: Automating Data Transformations with Serverless Compute

science.desc: Your company is migrating from an on-premise data warehouse to the cloud. Design a migration strategy, choosing between a pure data warehouse and a lakehouse approach.

modules.title: Distributed Systems for Data Processing
lessons: Fault tolerance & high availability in data systems
Data security & compliance in the cloud

scenario.title: Designing a Fault-Tolerant Data Ingestion System
Building a Real-time Analytics Pipeline
Implementing Data Masking for PII

milestones.label: M06
milestones.o: You will implement best practices in analytics engineering, lead data quality initiatives, and effectively manage stakeholders and team processes.
milestones.identity_statement: You are stepping into a leadership role, guiding teams and shaping the future of data analytics.

modules.title: Analytics Engineering Best Practices
lessons: Code review processes for data teams
Version control with Git for data projects

skills.title: Git & Version Control for Data Projects

scenario.title: Resolving Merge Conflicts in a dbt Project
Setting Up a CI/CD Pipeline for dbt
Detecting Data Quality Anomalies

science.desc: A critical data pipeline has failed silently, leading to outdated dashboards. Design a data observability strategy to prevent future occurrences.

modules.title: Stakeholder Management & Team Leadership
lessons: Project planning & agile methodologies for AE

video.title: Presenting Data Insights to Non-Technical Audiences

scenario.title: Managing Conflicting Stakeholder Requirements
Scoping and Planning a New Data Product

video.title: Fostering Growth in Data Engineering Teams

scenario.title: Mentoring a Junior Analytics Engineer

science.desc: How would you handle a situation where a key business stakeholder is resistant to adopting new data tools and processes?

milestones.label: M07
milestones.o: You will independently lead an end-to-end analytics engineering project, from architectural design to deployment and monitoring, demonstrating full leadership capability.
milestones.identity_statement: You are now a fully-fledged Analytics Engineering Lead, ready to drive impactful data initiatives and mentor future talent.

modules.title: End-to-End Analytics Engineering Project
lessons: Architectural decision-making for complex data systems

video.title: Leading a Data Platform Modernization Project

scenario.title: Defining Scope for a New Data Initiative
Designing a Scalable Data Platform from Scratch
Developing a Contingency Plan for Data Outages

science.desc: Present your capstone project's architecture, discuss key design decisions, and explain how you managed project risks and stakeholder expectations.
